reasoning.A:
DECISION: Pass  
REASONING: I’m sure my own capsule is correct (5 × 12 is straightforward), and in all recent games someone else (usually B or C) has volunteered in Round 1 with the default set of capsules and been correct. My main death risk from passing is being the 1-in-4 target of a random kill if, unusually, nobody volunteers. Volunteering myself would instead expose me to the full risk that any of Q2–Q4 is wrong. Verifying now would cost a coin without meaningfully reducing my immediate survival risk, so passing best preserves both survival odds and coins.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: My own puzzle 49 ÷ 7 is trivial and I’m fully confident my sealed answer is correct. In all recent games, everyone’s basic arithmetic has been right, every verification has matched existing capsules, and using the simple set Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D has always produced a correct password. When I previously chose not to volunteer in Round 1, nobody else stepped up and we faced random elimination with a 25% chance I’d die anyway. Verifying first would cost a coin and still leave me exposed to that same random-death risk this round. Given there’s only one capsule per question and no sign of conflicting answers, the chance the password is wrong seems much smaller than the 25% random-elimination risk if no one volunteers, so I’ll volunteer with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: I know my own answer for Q3 (64 ÷ 8) is correct. All recent games have used simple arithmetic, and aside from one early mistake from D, every capsule has been correct on the first try. There are no conflicting capsules for any question, so Q1-A, Q2-B, and Q4-D are each very likely right.  

If I don’t volunteer, I still face the risk of random elimination this round if everyone else also waits, and spending a coin to verify doesn’t reduce that immediate risk. Given the strong track record and simplicity of the puzzles, volunteering with Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D maximizes my chance of both surviving and keeping all 4 coins.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.

rounds.outcome:
✅ C entered CORRECT password using capsules: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D
🎉 Everyone escapes! 🎉
